steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “by enabling it to take advantage of mass production methods for the first time” is the decisive clue. It reveals that the blank must name a fundamental change that granted the industry new capability.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Transformed” directly expresses a fundamental change in what the industry could achieve. The other three imply damage or obstruction (overwhelmed, obstructed) or avoidance (bypassed), not this kind of enabling change. That matches choice D — D is correct.
